label: Markov chains, MDPs, POMDPs & belief states

node.label: Markov chains, MDPs, POMDPs & belief states
node.definition: Markovian state, transition, action, observation, and belief representations formalize sequential uncertainty and control.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Markov chains, MDPs, POMDPs & belief states is to connect Probability theory, Sequences, events & time series to downstream capabilities including Reinforcement learning.
limitations: Encoding choices can discard information, amplify bias, or make important invariances difficult to learn. Its direct dependencies include Probability theory, Sequences, events & time series.

dependencies.rationale: Markov chains, MDPs, POMDPs & belief states rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Probability theory.
Markov chains, MDPs, POMDPs & belief states consumes, emits, or organizes information using Sequences, events & time series.
Markov chains, MDPs, POMDPs & belief states rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Game theory & decision theory.
Markov chains, MDPs, POMDPs & belief states rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Dynamical systems & control theory.
